idea-plugin.name: Nord Islands
idea-plugin.description:
Nord Islands

A dark theme for JetBrains IDEs built on the Nord color palette and designed for the modern Islands UI.

  • Full Nord color palette (Nord 0–15) across all UI components
  • Islands-native: rounded corners, visual separation between tool windows, floating aesthetics
  • Comprehensive editor color scheme with language-specific highlighting for PHP, JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, CSS, JSON, YAML, and Markdown
  • Carefully tuned selection, hover, and focus states for readability
  • Full terminal ANSI color mapping

Successor to the original Nord JetBrains theme, updated for 2025.2+ with Islands support.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release with full Islands UI support
  • Complete Nord color palette integration
  • Editor color scheme with language-specific overrides
